race.description: Sign Up To Our Newsletter Handicap
race.comment: QUATRE BRAS (13) has already run some mighty races in some similar contests to this and looks to have a serious chance to get his head back in front from stall nine. MANO CHICAGO (9) returned from a long absence and indicated he retained his ability when second a fortnight ago. Was supported on that occasion and won't be far away making handicap debut. Also stepping into a handicap for the first time is AMPLITUDE (16) who ran okay at listed level last season. There is scope for serious improvement. The evergreen veteran COEUR D'OR (7) now has blinkers applied for the first time and warrants a market check.
